result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 31:     AND c.createddate >= p.start_dt
                               ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH params AS (
  SELECT (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')::timestamp AS start_dt
),
-- All owner assignments (casehistory where field is Owner)
owner_hist AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate AS assign_dt,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE LOWER(TRIM(ch.field__c)) = 'owner'
),
-- Identify cases that were transferred (more than 1 owner assignment)
transfer_flags AS (
  SELECT case_id,
         COUNT(*) AS owner_change_events
  FROM owner_hist
  GROUP BY case_id
),
-- For handle-time computation: only cases with no transfer (<=1 owner assignment)
eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  LEFT JOIN transfer_flags tf ON tf.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND COALESCE(tf.owner_change_events, 0) <= 1
),
-- Compute handle time per eligible case
case_handle AS (
  SELECT owner_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM eligible_cases
),
-- For "processing > 1 case" filter: count cases where agent was either first assigned (new owner)
-- or received transfer (new owner in any owner change)
agent_case_participation AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
         oh.new_owner AS agent_id,
         oh.case_id
  FROM owner_hist oh
  UNION
  -- include cases with no owner history (still processed by current owner)
  SELECT DISTINCT
         c.ownerid AS agent_id,
         c.id AS case_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  WHERE c.createddate >= p.start_dt
),
agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_processed
  FROM agent_case_participation
  GROUP BY agent_id
),
agent_aht AS (
  SELECT ch.owner_id AS agent_id,
         AVG(ch.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds,
         COUNT(*) AS closed_cases_count
  FROM case_handle ch
  GROUP BY ch.owner_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id AS id
FROM agent_aht a
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE acc.cases_processed > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')::timestamp AS start_dt
),
-- All owner assignments (casehistory where field is Owner)
owner_hist AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate AS assign_dt,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE LOWER(TRIM(ch.field__c)) = 'owner'
),
-- Identify cases that were transferred (more than 1 owner assignment)
transfer_flags AS (
  SELECT case_id,
         COUNT(*) AS owner_change_events
  FROM owner_hist
  GROUP BY case_id
),
-- For handle-time computation: only cases with no transfer (<=1 owner assignment)
eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  LEFT JOIN transfer_flags tf ON tf.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND COALESCE(tf.owner_change_events, 0) <= 1
),
-- Compute handle time per eligible case
case_handle AS (
  SELECT owner_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM eligible_cases
),
-- For "processing > 1 case" filter: count cases where agent was either first assigned (new owner)
-- or received transfer (new owner in any owner change)
agent_case_participation AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
         oh.new_owner AS agent_id,
         oh.case_id
  FROM owner_hist oh
  UNION
  -- include cases with no owner history (still processed by current owner)
  SELECT DISTINCT
         c.ownerid AS agent_id,
         c.id AS case_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  WHERE c.createddate >= p.start_dt
),
agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_processed
  FROM agent_case_participation
  GROUP BY agent_id
),
agent_aht AS (
  SELECT ch.owner_id AS agent_id,
         AVG(ch.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds,
         COUNT(*) AS closed_cases_count
  FROM case_handle ch
  GROUP BY ch.owner_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id AS id
FROM agent_aht a
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE acc.cases_processed > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')::timestamp AS start_dt
),
-- All owner assignments (casehistory where field is Owner)
owner_hist AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate AS assign_dt,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE LOWER(TRIM(ch.field__c)) = 'owner'
),
-- Identify cases that were transferred (more than 1 owner assignment)
transfer_flags AS (
  SELECT case_id,
         COUNT(*) AS owner_change_events
  FROM owner_hist
  GROUP BY case_id
),
-- For handle-time computation: only cases with no transfer (<=1 owner assignment)
eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  LEFT JOIN transfer_flags tf ON tf.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND COALESCE(tf.owner_change_events, 0) <= 1
),
-- Compute handle time per eligible case
case_handle AS (
  SELECT owner_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM eligible_cases
),
-- For "processing > 1 case" filter: count cases where agent was either first assigned (new owner)
-- or received transfer (new owner in any owner change)
agent_case_participation AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
         oh.new_owner AS agent_id,
         oh.case_id
  FROM owner_hist oh
  UNION
  -- include cases with no owner history (still processed by current owner)
  SELECT DISTINCT
         c.ownerid AS agent_id,
         c.id AS case_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  WHERE c.createddate >= p.start_dt
),
agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_processed
  FROM agent_case_participation
  GROUP BY agent_id
),
agent_aht AS (
  SELECT ch.owner_id AS agent_id,
         AVG(ch.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds,
         COUNT(*) AS closed_cases_count
  FROM case_handle ch
  GROUP BY ch.owner_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id AS id
FROM agent_aht a
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE acc.cases_processed > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')::timestamp AS start_dt
),
owner_hist AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS assign_dt,
    TRIM(ch.oldvalue__c) AS old_owner,
    TRIM(ch.newvalue__c) AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE LOWER(TRIM(ch.field__c)) = 'owner'
),
transfer_flags AS (
  SELECT case_id,
         COUNT(*) AS owner_change_events
  FROM owner_hist
  GROUP BY case_id
),
eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         TRIM(c.ownerid) AS owner_id,
         c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  LEFT JOIN transfer_flags tf ON tf.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt
    AND COALESCE(tf.owner_change_events, 0) <= 1
),
case_handle AS (
  SELECT owner_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM eligible_cases
),
agent_case_participation AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
         oh.new_owner AS agent_id,
         oh.case_id
  FROM owner_hist oh
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT
         TRIM(c.ownerid) AS agent_id,
         c.id AS case_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  WHERE c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt
),
agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_processed
  FROM agent_case_participation
  GROUP BY agent_id
),
agent_aht AS (
  SELECT ch.owner_id AS agent_id,
         AVG(ch.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM case_handle ch
  GROUP BY ch.owner_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id AS id
FROM agent_aht a
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE acc.cases_processed > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON TRUE

agent_case_participation AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
         oh.new_owner AS agent_id,
         oh.case_id

  SELECT DISTINCT

  JOIN params p ON TRUE

agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_processed
